productDisplayName: Converse Men's Chuck Taylor As Canvas OX Shoe
description: CompositionGreen unisex lace-up shoes made with canvas uppers and rubber outsolesshoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm waterThese shoes from converse come is a fresh take on the classic oxford design with durable green canvas uppers, canvas lining and cushioned footbed for hours of uniterrupted style and comfort. The whitelace-up front with metallic eyelets ensures a snug Fit while the original rubber toe box and toe guard give added protection. The multi-directional outsole gives added grip.
